title: Social Security Advisory Committee: minutes of meetings in 2025
body: "These minutes provide a formal record of the committee’s scrutiny of the social security regulations presented to it by the Department for Work and Pensions, the Department for Communities (Northern Ireland) or HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC).  Please note that regulations are not necessarily presented to the committee every month.  More information  If you have any questions about the most recent meeting that has taken place, please contact the secretariat at ssac@ssac.gov.uk for clarification.  "
